summary: Excellent audience recording of an electrifying early‑80s show, highlighted by scorching Scarlet Begonias and Fire.
review: The three reviewers all rave about the high‑energy performance, noting Jerry’s “possessed” playing and the sheer magic of the set—especially the blistering Scarlet Begonias/Fire segment.  While the source is an audience tape, the crowd‑band blend is described as clear and enticing, making the recording a worthwhile download.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews give 5 stars, praising both the show’s musical intensity and the enjoyable audience mix; recording quality is good for an Aud source, so the combined weighted score is very high.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience tape praised for its clear crowd‑band blend and overall pleasant sound; no major flaws reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy, magical performance with consistent intensity throughout; the scarlet/fire segment is singled out as a highlight.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as sounding possessed and full of energy.
